Product Guide: ReactorCLIComponent ID: F-TOOL-CLIClassification: Control InterfaceAuthor: Systems Lead1. Vision & PurposeReactorCLI is the "Cockpit" for the Fusion Runtime. It is used to interact with running Supernova or Nebula instances to tune performance in real-time.2. Technical Replacement SpecsReplaces: systemctl, top, custom admin dashboards.Protocol: Uses the FUSION MCP to communicate with the runtime.3. Commandsreactor set-policy <core> <policy>: Switches a core from Batch to RealTime.reactor hot-patch <file.so>: Injects a new version of a function into the running process.reactor drain <core>: Gracefully moves tasks off a core for maintenance.4. Why this existsFor mission-critical systems that cannot be restarted but require performance adjustments based on shifting load patterns.
